languages.original_text: "You have distracted me so long with your pitiful attempts at resistance that I am now able to soberly consider the fate of this Museion and even resign myself to its loss. After all, it is only a small portion of it, an insignificant collection in an insignificant corner of the galaxy. So I will repeat my offer: Seberian von Valancius in exchange for the Warrant. I will even let you have the Crimson Dance of Khaine. It will be somewhat ironic: the little thief will have gained a legendary weapon for his dynasty after all."

languages.text: "Ты достаточно долго отвлекал{mf||а} меня своими жалкими попытками сопротивления, чтобы я спокойно обдумал судьбу этого Музеона и даже смирился с его утратой — в конце концов это лишь малая его часть, малозначимое собрание в малозначимом углу галактики. Поэтому я повторю свое предложение: Себериан фон Валанциус в обмен на {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Патент{/g}. Я даже позволю тебе забрать Багряную пляску Кхейна. По своему это будет даже иронично: маленький воришка все же заполучит легендарное оружие для своей династии".

traits.locale_text: "Ты достаточно долго отвлекал{mf||а} меня своими жалкими попытками сопротивления, чтобы я спокойно обдумал судьбу этого Музеона и даже смирился с его утратой — в конце концов это лишь малая его часть, малозначимое собрание в малозначимом углу галактики. traits.speaker: Trazyn_Eternal_Boss

languages.text: «Me has distraído tanto tiempo con tu penosa obstinación que ahora puedo plantearme seriamente el destino de este Museion, e incluso resignarme a perderlo. Después de todo, solo es una pequeña porción de él; una colección insignificante en un rincón insignificante de la galaxia. Repetiré mi oferta: Seberian von Valancius a cambio de la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Patente{/g}. Incluso dejaré que te quedes con la Danza Carmesí de Khaine. Será algo irónico: {mf|el|la} ladronzuel{mf|o|a} habrá obtenido un arma legendaria para su dinastía, después de todo».
languages.original_text: "You have distracted me so long with your pitiful attempts at resistance that I am now able to soberly consider the fate of this Museion and even resign myself to its loss. Será algo irónico: {mf|el|la} ladronzuel{mf|o|a} habrá obtenido un arma legendaria para su dinastía, después de todo».

languages.text: “你用那可悲的抵抗拖了我这么久，倒让我得以冷静思考这座陈列馆的命运，甚至甘心接受它的损失。毕竟这只是其中一小部分，银河系无人在意的角落里不值一提的收藏而已。所以我再说一遍我的提议：用塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯来换{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}贸易授状{/g}。我甚至会把凯恩的猩红之舞也留给你。想想还挺讽刺，那个小贼终究还是为他的王朝赢得了一件传奇武器。”
languages.original_text: "You have distracted me so long with your pitiful attempts at resistance that I am now able to soberly consider the fate of this Museion and even resign myself to its loss. After all, it is only a small portion of it, an insignificant collection in an insignificant corner of the galaxy. So I will repeat my offer: Seberian von Valancius in exchange for the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}. I will even let you have the Crimson Dance of Khaine. It will be somewhat ironic: the little thief will have gained a legendary weapon for his dynasty after all."

traits.locale_text: “你用那可悲的抵抗拖了我这么久，倒让我得以冷静思考这座陈列馆的命运，甚至甘心接受它的损失。毕竟这只是其中一小部分，银河系无人在意的角落里不值一提的收藏而已。所以我再说一遍我的提议：用塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯来换{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}贸易授状{/g}。我甚至会把凯恩的猩红之舞也留给你。想想还挺讽刺，那个小贼终究还是为他的王朝赢得了一件传奇武器。”

languages.text: « Vos misérables tentatives de résistance m'ont diverti suffisamment longtemps pour que je puisse maintenant réfléchir calmement à ce qu'il va advenir de cette collection, et même me résigner à sa perte. Après tout, ce n'est qu'une petite partie de mon Muséion, une galerie sans importance dans un coin insignifiant de la galaxie. Je vais donc réitérer ma proposition : Seberian von Valancius en échange de la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}lettre de marque{/g}. Je vous permettrai même de garder la Danse écarlate de Khaine, un geste quelque peu ironique : le petit voleur aura gagné une arme légendaire pour sa dynastie, au bout du compte. »
languages.original_text: "You have distracted me so long with your pitiful attempts at resistance that I am now able to soberly consider the fate of this Museion and even resign myself to its loss. It will be somewhat ironic: the little thief will have gained a legendary weapon for his dynasty after all."

traits.locale_text: « Vos misérables tentatives de résistance m'ont diverti suffisamment longtemps pour que je puisse maintenant réfléchir calmement à ce qu'il va advenir de cette collection, et même me résigner à sa perte. Je vous permettrai même de garder la Danse écarlate de Khaine, un geste quelque peu ironique : le petit voleur aura gagné une arme légendaire pour sa dynastie, au bout du compte. »

languages.text: "Acınası direniş çabalarınla beni o kadar uzun süre oyaladın ki artık bu Museion'un kaderini aklıselimce düşünebilir ve hatta kaybını kabullenebilirim. Sonuçta bu, küçük bir parçadan ibaret. Galaksinin önemsiz bir köşesindeki önemsiz bir koleksiyon. Teklifimi tekrarlayacağım: {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Ruhsatname{/g} karşılığında Seberian von Valancius'u istiyorum. Hatta Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nı almana bile izin veriyorum. Biraz ironik bir durum. Küçük hırsız, hanedanlığına efsanevi bir silah kazandırmış olacak."
languages.original_text: "You have distracted me so long with your pitiful attempts at resistance that I am now able to soberly consider the fate of this Museion and even resign myself to its loss. After all, it is only a small portion of it, an insignificant collection in an insignificant corner of the galaxy. So I will repeat my offer: Seberian von Valancius in exchange for the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}. I will even let you have the Crimson Dance of Khaine. It will be somewhat ironic: the little thief will have gained a legendary weapon for his dynasty after all."

traits.locale_text: "Acınası direniş çabalarınla beni o kadar uzun süre oyaladın ki artık bu Museion'un kaderini aklıselimce düşünebilir ve hatta kaybını kabullenebilirim. Sonuçta bu, küçük bir parçadan ibaret. Galaksinin önemsiz bir köşesindeki önemsiz bir koleksiyon. Teklifimi tekrarlayacağım: {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Ruhsatname{/g} karşılığında Seberian von Valancius'u istiyorum. Hatta Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nı almana bile izin veriyorum. Biraz ironik bir durum. Küçük hırsız, hanedanlığına efsanevi bir silah kazandırmış olacak."

languages.text: "Du hast mich mit deinen jämmerlichen Versuchen, dich zu widersetzen, so lange abgelenkt, dass ich in der Lage bin, das Schicksal dieses Museions nüchtern zu betrachten und mich sogar mit seinem Verlust abfinden kann. Immerhin ist es nur ein kleiner Teil davon, eine unbedeutende Sammlung in einem unbedeutenden Winkel der Galaxie. Ich wiederhole mein Angebot also: Seberian von Valancius im Tausch für den {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Handelsbrief{/g}. Du darfst sogar Blutroter Tanz von Khaine behalten. Wäre das nicht herrlich ironisch? Der kleine Dieb bekäme immerhin eine legendäre Waffe für seine Dynastie."
languages.original_text: "You have distracted me so long with your pitiful attempts at resistance that I am now able to soberly consider the fate of this Museion and even resign myself to its loss. Wäre das nicht herrlich ironisch? Der kleine Dieb bekäme immerhin eine legendäre Waffe für seine Dynastie."

languages.text: 「あなたの哀れな抵抗の試みで、私は長い間気を散らされていましたが、今はこのミュゼイオンの運命を冷静に考え、その喪失を受け入れることができます。結局のところ、それは銀河の隅々にある、取るに足らないコレクションの一部に過ぎません。ですから、私の申し出を繰り返します。{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}保証書{/g}と引き換えに、シベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスを差し上げます。さらに、カイヌの紅舞も差し上げます。それは少し皮肉な話ですね。小さな泥棒が、結局は自分の家系に伝説の武器を手に入れたのです。」
languages.original_text: "You have distracted me so long with your pitiful attempts at resistance that I am now able to soberly consider the fate of this Museion and even resign myself to its loss. It will be somewhat ironic: the little thief will have gained a legendary weapon for his dynasty after all."
